clauses.text: This Agreement is entered into between [LICENSOR_NAME] ("Licensor") and [LICENSEE_NAME] ("Licensee") regarding [SOFTWARE_NAME].

The Licensor grants the Licensee a [LICENSE_TYPE], non-transferable license to use [SOFTWARE_NAME] solely for [PERMITTED_USE], limited to [NUMBER_OF_USERS] users, during the period defined in the Term Clause.
The license granted under the Grant Clause does not include the right to sublicense, resell, or distribute [SOFTWARE_NAME] to any third party without the Licensor's prior written consent.

The Licensee shall not: (a) reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble [SOFTWARE_NAME], except to the extent this restriction is prohibited by applicable law for the purpose of achieving interoperability; (b) remove or alter any proprietary notice; or (c) use [SOFTWARE_NAME] beyond the scope defined in the License Grant Clause.
This Agreement commences on [LICENSE_START_DATE] and continues for [LICENSE_TERM_PERIOD], unless earlier terminated in accordance with this Agreement.
The Licensee shall pay the Licensor [TOTAL_VALUE] for the license granted under this Agreement, payable via [PAYMENT_METHOD].
The Licensor warrants that [SOFTWARE_NAME] shall perform substantially in accordance with its documentation for a period of [WARRANTY_PERIOD_DAYS] days from [LICENSE_START_DATE].
Except as expressly stated in the Baseline Warranty Clause, [SOFTWARE_NAME] is provided without any other warranty, to the maximum extent permitted by applicable law.
The Licensor may provide updates to [SOFTWARE_NAME] at its discretion. Updates provided under this Clause do not extend the Term unless the Parties agree otherwise in writing.
The Licensor may provide technical support for [SOFTWARE_NAME] under terms agreed separately between the Parties, which do not form part of this Agreement unless expressly incorporated.
Each Party's total liability arising from this Agreement shall not exceed [TOTAL_VALUE], except as provided in the Uncapped Liability Clause.
The cap in the Liability Cap Clause shall not apply to loss arising from a Party's gross negligence, willful misconduct, fraud, or breach of the Restrictions Clause.

Either Party may terminate this Agreement immediately by written notice if the other Party materially breaches this Agreement and fails to remedy the breach within [CURE_PERIOD_DAYS] days of receiving written notice.
Upon termination, the Licensee shall immediately cease all use of [SOFTWARE_NAME] and destroy or return all copies in its possession.
This Agreement shall be governed by [APPLICABLE_LAW]. Any dispute shall be submitted to [DISPUTE_RESOLUTION_MECHANISM] before litigation, except where interim injunctive relief is required.
The Parties have executed this Agreement as of [SIGNATURE_DATE].
